creator: bryan@shatow.net
text:
The recent update to the pkg-plist today added an extra 'lib/'.

	Error:
	=======================<phase: package  >==========================
	===>  Building package for openssl-1.0.1_4
	tar: lib/lib/engines/lib4758cca.so: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
	tar: lib/lib/engines/libaep.so: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
	tar: lib/lib/engines/libatalla.so: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
	tar: lib/lib/engines/libcapi.so: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
	tar: lib/lib/engines/libchil.so: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
	tar: lib/lib/engines/libcswift.so: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
	tar: lib/lib/engines/libgmp.so: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
	tar: lib/lib/engines/libgost.so: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
	tar: lib/lib/engines/libnuron.so: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
	tar: lib/lib/engines/libpadlock.so: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
	tar: lib/lib/engines/libsureware.so: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
	tar: lib/lib/engines/libubsec.so: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
	tar: Error exit delayed from previous errors.

How-To-Repeat: 	Build the port with SHARED enabled.
